title: Electrical Retrofit — Nardini MS175E Lathe
description: A Brazilian-made Nardini MS175E industrial lathe required repair of the automation system and adaptation of the electrical control cabinet to European standards. The work included diagnostics of the control circuit, rewiring, replacement and correction of electrical components, safety-related improvements and final functional testing of the machine.
image_alt: Nardini MS175E industrial lathe electrical retrofit and automation repair by AKEI Latvia
meta_description: Electrical retrofit and automation repair for Nardini MS175E industrial lathe. Control cabinet diagnostics, rewiring and adaptation to European standards by AKEI Latvia.
